sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n73061" key="o)ligopu/qmhn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀλῐγο-πύθμην</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ενος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, sine expl., <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Theognost.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Can.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">86</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
